prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第83名持续上升至2025年第69名，202 6年微降至第71名，整体处于全国中上游水平；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%引发关注；抖音热度总排名第62位，评价为"一般"， 未见明显投档断档记录；民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-；其中统计学与物理类招生专业中的统计学、数据科学与大数据技 术等直接相关，生态学对应生态学（菁英班）等专业，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与云 南大学物理类主要招生方向一致，有助于维持报考热度；湖南省物理类考生2021年205920→2025年320192→2026年347000，2026年较2025年增加约26808人（+8.4%），竞争加剧；云南大学位于昆明市，属西南地区，对湖南省考生而言属于跨省就读；该校在湖南省招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），非主要生源 地，地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次33317、2026年大幅扩招24.2%、湖南省物理类考生增加8.4%加剧竞争、学校软科 排名微降及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次；预测最低位次约38363名，区间37863–38863名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16488 → 19245 → 22150 → 35798 → 33317, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, due to a significant expansion in enrollment, the ranking dropped sharply to 35798, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 33317, with a cumulative backward shift of about 16829 positions over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 33317. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 102 in 2021, 112 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 156 in 2024, and 165 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 205, an increase of 40 students (+24.2%) compared to 2025. The expansion is relatively large, easing competition pressure, but the total number of examinees is also increasing simultaneously.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been continuously rising from 83rd in 2021 to 69th in 2025, slightly dropping to 71st in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences being only 4.63%, which attracted attention. Douyin popularity total ranking is 62nd, with an evaluation of "average"; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-; among these, Statistics is directly related to majors such as Statistics and Data Science and Big Data Technology in the Physics Category enrollment, and Ecology corresponds to majors like Ecology (Elite Class), which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, consistent with the main enrollment directions of Yunnan University's Physics Category, helping to maintain application popularity. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province was 205,920 in 2021 → 320,192 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 26,808 people (+8.4%) from 2025 to 2026, intensifying competition. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the Southwest region, which is an inter-provincial study destination for Hunan examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is about 2.5% (2024 data), not a major source of students, so regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 33317, the significant enrollment expansion of 24.2% in 2026, the 8.4% increase in Hunan Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, the slight drop in Soft Science ranking, and the somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 38363, with a range of 37863–38863.
